rows.strict_supervisor_conclusion: Window 001 is stronger than a preparatory seed only. It already shows a real supportive early-board-width response across industrial, formal, and emotion names. It should be released as a positive support sample, but still remain below the cleaner January ignition archetype.

interpretation: Window 001 is now evidence-backed as a supportive early-board-width positive sample.
It is stronger than a bare seed, but still should not overrule the cleaner January ignition archetype.
This release reduces under-review noise while keeping the hierarchy between 001 and 002 intact.
